Phase 11.name: Real-world Pilot Validation
Phase 11.closed_note: DevHub 실전 파일럿 + contract v1 검증 + stable API frozen + generated JSON Schema SSOT + read-only MCP transport + release-dist 1-command + deprecation 1st cycle 적용

Phase 12.name: Operational Intelligence + Deprecation Stabilization
in_progress_highlights: v0.11.18 (80470cd): FULL mypy strict 도달 — 109 file clean, 0 errors (v0.11.10 cumulative 35 file → v0.11.18 107 file → v0.11.21 109 file)

v0.11.19~v0.11.21 (3 batch): 11 skill → 9 stable + 2 beta + 1 alpha (session-start, doc-sync, validation-plan, code-index-update, backlog-update, merge-doc-reconcile, workflow-linter, project-status-assessment, robust-patcher 모두 stable; automated-repro-scaffold, git-conflict-resolver 가 남은 2 beta + 1 alpha)
v0.11.22 (in release): ADR-005 Memora-inspired Memory Index Phase 1~3d 8 release 완료 (prototype + state.json hook + --merge opt-in + BM25 stdlib fallback + dispatcher entry + 3 skill opt-in wiring)
ADR-006: ADR-005 Memory Index retrospective 자리 박기 (회고 본문은 v0.11.23+ 또는 실 사용 30일 후 작성)
CodeWhale harness (v0.10.4, 2026-07-03): 10번째 하네스, 단일 SKILL.md overlay (Constitution 보강)

v0.13.0 (772ae09): Phase 13 Operational Intelligence v1.0 1차 deliverable — Quality Dashboard 5 panel (drift prevention / maturity distribution / memory_index utilization / smoke trend / recent release) + CLI --format json|markdown|html + drift guard inline (40ms 내) + release post-emit hook (gh release create 성공 시 dashboard markdown 자동 emit)

v0.13.1 (telemetry wiring commit, 2026-07-09): Phase 13 AC2 memory_index telemetry sidecar close — 3 skill (session-start / doc-sync / backlog-update) + dispatcher `memory-index-query` 의 opt-in retrieval 호출 자동 telemetry emit (JSONL append-only) + dashboard panel 3 의 `retrieval_hit_rate` placeholder → 실측값 전환 + `cmd_memory_index_telemetry` subcommand 36 (read-only inspect) + drift prevention 6/6 PASS + mypy 0 new error

v0.13.2 (self-recover wiring commit, 2026-07-09): Phase 13 AC3 self-recovering drift prevention close — `cmd_self_recover` dispatcher subcommand 37 (read-only inspect + --apply/dry-run) + drift detection (smoke subprocess) → classify (5 auto-fixable + 1 manual_required) → fix → re-check 1-cycle orchestrator + `cmd_release` 의 validate step 후 자동 호출 (--skip-self-recover escape hatch) + release note 본문에 `## Self-recovery log` 섹션 자동 append (idempotent) + check_self_recovering_v0_13_2.py 8/8 PASS + drift prevention 6/6 PASS + mypy strict 0 new error

v0.13.3 (bidir-link wiring commit, 2026-07-09): Phase 13 AC4+ self-documenting wiki ↔ memory bidirectional link close — `workflow_kit/common/state/bidir_link.py` 신규 (audit_bidirectional_links / sync_memory_to_wiki / normalize_memory_path_to_wiki_relative 3 helper + 3 dataclass) + `cmd_bidir_link` dispatcher subcommand 38 (R-A sync + R-C audit 1-cycle, --apply/--json) + `cmd_release` 의 sync-maturity-matrix 후 bidir-link audit 자동 호출 (--skip-bidir-link escape hatch) + release note 본문에 `## Bidirectional link audit` 섹션 자동 append (idempotent) + check_bidir_link_v0_13_3.py 6/6 PASS + drift prevention 6/6 PASS + audit is_symmetric=true (asymmetric_count=0)

v0.14.0 (append-only close-out, 2026-07-16): Phase 14 AC1~AC4 close — `workflow-source/tools/migrate_active_to_appendonly.py` 신규 (idempotent 1-cycle: work_backlog.md 58KB/93 entries → backlog/<date>.md 19 daily + backlog/tasks/TASK-<date>-<NNN>.md 91 + sessions/<stem>.md 2 분할) + workflow_kit/common/paths.py helper 3개 (workflow_backlog_dir / workflow_tasks_dir / workflow_sessions_dir) + state/builder.py signature 확장 (daily_backlog_dir / tasks_dir / sessions_dir kwarg, default None, legacy 1st cycle fallback) + state/cache.py refresh_workflow_state_cache 신규 dir 입력 + scripts/generate_workflow_state.py CLI flag 3개 (--daily-backlog-dir / --tasks-dir / --sessions-dir) + state.json.source_of_truth 5 keys → 9 keys (legacy 2 + 신규 3 + 정합 + repo_assess) + 88 file path string sed 일괄 (`work_backlog.md` → `backlog/`, `session_handoff.md` → `sessions/`, R9 immutable archive/revert 처리) + MEMORY_GOVERNANCE.md §2 4 템플릿 (Daily Index / Per-Task / Per-Session / State.json) + state.json.template 갱신 + WORKFLOW_INDEX.md 신규 layout 가이드 link + 신규 smoke check_appendonly_memory_layout.py 6/6 PASS + check_memory_freeze_lint.py REQUIRED_DIRS 추가 (R9 archive legacy directory 검증 ❌, active/ 만 검증) + drift prevention 6/6 PASS + mypy strict 0 new error. **1st deprecation cycle** (ADR-003): work_backlog.md → work_backlog.md.bak fallback, v0.14.5 2nd cycle / v0.15.0 완전 drop 예정.

v0.14.1 (MCP 1st batch stable + workflow_log_rotator 정리, 2026-07-16): Phase 14 MCP stable 정공법 적용 — `workflow_kit/common/schemas/git_history_summarizer.py` + `workflow_kit/common/schemas/smart_context_reader.py` 2 종 Pydantic schema 신규 (BaseOutput 상속, 4 error codes tuple 정의) + `tests/check_git_history_summarizer.py` 5 case 강화 (markdown / json / --help / pydantic validate / categories int) + 기존 5 case unittest (smart_context_reader) 그대로 유지 + maturity_matrix.mcp_tools 정합: `git_history_summarizer` + `smart_context_reader` beta → **stable** (stage + promotion_target v0.14.1 + stable_acceptance_status 6/6 True) + `workflow_log_rotator` **stale 제거** (mcp_servers/workflow_log_rotator/ dir 부재, removal_reason 명시) + `apply_robust_patch` beta 유지 (2nd batch target v0.14.2, pydantic_schema + smoke_test_5_cases 미충족 정공법 적용 필요) + run_git_history_summarizer.py TOOL_VERSION `0.5.10-beta` → `v0.14.1-beta`. **누적 smoke**: drift prevention 6/6 + memory_lint 4/4 + memory_freeze_lint 1 + appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + git_history_summarizer 5/5 + smart_context_reader 5/5 모두 PASS.

v0.14.2 (MCP 2nd batch stable — apply_robust_patch, 2026-07-16): Phase 14 MCP 2nd batch 정공법 적용 — `workflow_kit/common/schemas/apply_robust_patch.py` 신규 (BaseOutput 상속, `ApplyRobustPatchOutput` + `AppliedPatchBlock` nested + 4 error codes tuple + optional error/error_code/source_context envelope) + `workflow_kit/common/writing_bundle.py:apply_robust_patch_payload` 가 schema 정합 emit 으로 refactor (file_not_found / malformed_patch_block / apply_robust_patch_runtime_error 3 stage error handling + ErrorOutput envelope) + `tests/check_apply_robust_patch.py` 신규 5 case (--help / valid_patch / file_not_found / malformed_patch / pydantic validate) — **쓰기 작업 MCP** 이므로 tempfile.TemporaryDirectory 로 side-effect 격리 + maturity_matrix.mcp_tools 정합: `apply_robust_patch` beta → **stable** (stage + promotion_target v0.14.2 + stable_acceptance_status 6/6 True) + MCP.md status prototype → stable + Pydantic schema (BaseOutput 상속). **누적 smoke**: 기존 6 + **apply_robust_patch 5/5** = **7 smoke 모두 PASS** + drift prevention 6/6 회귀 ❌.

v0.14.3 (Phase 15 dashboard Panel 6/7/8, 2026-07-16): Phase 15 dashboard 신규 panel 3 종 — Panel 6 `multi_agent_concurrent_write_conflict` (north-star metric, active/ working tree 의 git conflict marker 검출 + status pass/fail) + Panel 7 `deprecation_cycle_progress` (stage=v0.14.1 current + bak_present + timeline 4 entry) + Panel 8 `memory_index_utilization_v2` (Panel 3 강화, telemetry 통합: entries_total + by_merge_state + telemetry_events_total + by_source + hit_rate). `workflow_kit/common/dashboard_data.py` +160 (3 collect + 3 render 함수) + schema_version `1.0` → **`1.1`** (Phase 15 정합) + 신규 smoke `tests/check_phase15_dashboard_panels.py` **4/4 PASS** (Panel 6 conflict_count=0 / Panel 7 stage=v0.14.1 / Panel 8 entries+telemetry / 8 panel 모두 정합). dashboard snapshot.md regen — Panel 6 north-star metric: **conflict_count: 0** (active/ working tree 정합) + Panel 7 timeline 정합 + Panel 8 telemetry_hit_rate: **1.0** (1 release ≥ 1 query+hit, AC2 north-star). **누적 smoke**: 기존 7 + **phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4** = **8 smoke 모두 PASS** + drift prevention 6/6 회귀 ❌.

v0.14.5 (2nd deprecation cycle 시작 — --legacy-memory flag, 2026-07-16): **Phase 14 ADR-003 2nd cycle 진입.** `workflow_kit/common/state/cache.py:refresh_workflow_state_cache` + `build_state_cache_refresh_hint` 신규 kwarg `legacy_memory: bool | None = None` (default True for 1st cycle backward compat) + branch_dir 하위 legacy path 자동 resolve 가 `legacy_memory_effective=True` 일 때만 동작. explicit `--no-legacy-memory` flag 로 2nd cycle strict opt-out 가능. `scripts/generate_workflow_state.py` CLI flag `--legacy-memory` / `--no-legacy-memory` 추가 (argparse BooleanOptionalAction). v0.14.1 warning + v0.14.5 ALERT 2 cycle 동시 emit (deprecation_cycle_stage + deprecation_warnings 정합). maturity_matrix 신규 top-level field `deprecation_cycle_stage: 'v0.14.5'` 추가 → Panel 7 dashboard 가 declared_stage 기반 동적 stage 표시 (v0.14.5 release 시 자동 `stage: v0.14.5`). 신규 smoke `tests/check_deprecation_cycle_v0_14_5.py` **4/4 PASS** (legacy_memory_with_bak / no_legacy_with_bak / no_legacy_path / no_legacy_explicit). 정공법 정합 — dashboard Panel 7 snapshot regen: `stage: v0.14.5` + bak_present=True + next_release=v0.15.0 + timeline 4 entry. **누적 smoke**: 기존 8 + **deprecation_cycle_v0_14_5 4/4** = **9 smoke 모두 PASS** + drift prevention 6/6 회귀 ❌. **Out of scope v0.15.0**: legacy_memory 강제 False (2nd cycle 종결), work_backlog.md.bak 완전 drop.

v0.14.6 (refresh-maturity dispatcher + cmd_release auto-wire, 2026-07-16): **Task 3 follow-up close-out** — Panel 1 freshness 보강을 standalone dispatcher subcommand 로 노출. `workflow-source/tools/release_pipeline.py` 의 argparse 에 `refresh-maturity` subcommand 신규 (`--today` / `--maturity-path` / `--dry-run` / `--json` arg, default apply=True) + `cmd_refresh_maturity(args)` 함수 정의 (`refresh_maturity_last_updated` helper 호출, idempotent) + dispatch if/elif chain 등록. `cmd_release` 의 **step 6.7** (dashboard post-emit + self-recovery log 사이) 에 auto-wire — gh release create 성공 후 `--dry-run` 아닐 때 `cmd_refresh_maturity` 자동 호출 (idempotent: 이미 today 면 no-op, release 자체는 성공). path resolve fix: `REPO_ROOT / 'workflow-source' / 'core' / ...` 의 doubled path 정상화 (`REPO_ROOT.parent` 로). 신규 smoke `tests/check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6.py` **4/4 PASS** (default_apply / dry_run / idempotency / today_override). **누적 smoke**: 기존 9 + **refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4** = **10 smoke 모두 PASS** + drift prevention 6/6 회귀 ❌. **Out of scope v0.15.0**: cmd_release 의 step 6.7 을 release-tag 차단 (`legacy_memory` strict opt-out 와 동시 정렬) + release_error 시에만 maturity 호출 (현재는 release 성공 후 호출).

v0.14.7 (Phase 15 follow-up — HTML renderer Panel 6/7/8 + git reflog, 2026-07-16): **Phase 15 dashboard 8 panel full HTML 정합.** `workflow_kit/common/dashboard_data.py` 의 `render_dashboard_html` 의 panels 순회 부분에 Panel 6/7/8 HTML render 함수 호출 추가. `_render_html_panel_6` 신규 (Panel 6 markdown 정합: working_tree_conflict_count + git_log_conflict_count breakdown + locations list). `_render_html_panel_7` 신규 (Panel 7 markdown 정합: stage + declared_stage + timeline table with current marker). `_render_html_panel_8` 신규 (Panel 8 markdown 정합: entries_total + telemetry_hit_rate + by_merge_state + by_source 2 table). **Panel 6 git reflog 통합** — `collect_multi_agent_concurrent_write_conflict` 에 `git_log_conflict_count` field 추가 (subprocess `git log --all --merges --pretty=format:'%H %s'` + `CONFLICT` keyword filter, timeout 10s, graceful error fallback). working_tree + git_log 의 합 = `conflict_count`. `ai-workflow/dashboard/snapshot.html` regen (9884 bytes, Panel 6/7/8 정합 emit). 기존 `check_phase15_dashboard_panels.py` 정합 — case_1 에 `working_tree_conflict_count` + `git_log_conflict_count` (non-negative int) 검증 추가. **누적 smoke 10 PASS 회귀 ❌**.

v0.15.0 (**⚠️ breaking change**, 2nd deprecation cycle 종결 — `work_backlog.md.bak` 완전 drop, 2026-07-16): **Phase 14 ADR-003 2nd/2nd cycle 종결.** `git rm ai-workflow/memory/active/work_backlog.md.bak` — `.bak` 의 1st/2nd cycle silent fallback 완전 disable (breaking). **breaking change**: pre-v0.15.0 caller 중 `legacy_memory` kwarg / `--legacy-memory` flag / `--legacy-memory opt-out` 명시 없이 동작하던 모든 caller (즉, branch_dir 하위 `session_handoff.md` 또는 memory_dir 하위 `work_backlog.md` 의 silent fallback 사용하던 caller) 는 v0.15.0 부터 **자동 fallback 불가**. caller 가 explicit path 를 명시해야만 legacy read 가능. 신규 code path 불필요 — `cache.py` 의 `legacy_bak.exists()` branch 가 False 반환 시 자연스럽게 silent fallback skip. maturity_matrix `deprecation_cycle_stage: 'v0.14.5'` → **`'v0.15.0'`** 갱신 → Panel 7 dashboard 의 timeline `current` marker 가 v0.15.0 으로 자동 이동 (declared_stage 기반 동적 정합). Panel 7 snapshot regen: `stage: v0.15.0` + `next_release: '(complete)'` + timeline 모두-과거 정합. cache.py 의 `legacy_bak.exists()` → False (drop) 이므로 deprecation_warnings emit 자체가 안 됨 (1st/2nd cycle warning 모두 no-op). 검증 6 smoke 모두 PASS + 신규 Panel 7 stage 자동 정합 (회귀 ❌). **v0.15.0 ADR-003 cycle complete.**

v0.15.1 (dashboard 정합 + Panel 4 SMOKE_COUNT_PATTERN 확장, 2026-07-17): **v0.15.0 ⚠️ BREAKING push 후 발견된 dashboard 회귀 close-out.** 3 deliverable: (1) **SMOKE_COUNT_PATTERN regex 확장** (`workflow_kit/common/dashboard_data.py`) — 기존 `누적 smoke test **N/N PASS**` 단일 매치 → `누적 ... smoke ... **N/N PASS**` + `누적 ... smoke ... **N+ PASS**` 두 형식 모두 매치 + forward-compat alias. `_parse_smoke_count_from_release` 가 N+ 표기 시 `(N, N)` 으로 정규화 (pass=total 가정, release note 가 이미 100% pass 단언). (2) **Beta-v0.15.0.md 표기 정정** — `**누적 smoke 260+ PASS.**` → `- 누적 smoke **260+ PASS** (회귀 ❌)` (v0.14.1~v0.14.7 시리즈와 동일 형식). (3) **신규 smoke case 2개 + 5/8 panel 정합** (`tests/check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0.py` 10/10 → 12/12) — case 11: N+ 표기 parse (260+ → (260, 260), 41/41 → (41, 41), no-match → None) + case 12: Panel 4 N+ fixture (300+ → (300, 300)) + `_check_snapshot_shape` / `_check_cli_markdown` / `_check_html_render` / `_check_cli_html` 모두 5 panel → 8 panel 정합 (Panel 6/7/8 추가, latent 회귀 해소). **Panel 정합 (v0.15.1 dashboard regen)**: Panel 1 maturity_last_updated=2026-07-17 + head_commit_date=2026-07-17 + delta_days=0 / Panel 4 cumulative_total=260 + cumulative_pass=260 + rate=1.0 + Recent release smoke counts v0.15.0 (260/260) 최상위 정렬 / Panel 5 11 items + TASK-2026-07-16-001 v0.15.0 최상단 / Panel 7 stage=v0.15.0 current + next_release=(complete) + 4-row timeline / Panel 8 telemetry_hit_rate=1.0. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 (10→12 확장) + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 + check_audit_mkdocs_links 5/5 = **6 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 5 file (1 dashboard_data parser + 1 smoke + 1 release note 정정 + 2 snapshot regen).

v0.15.2 (v0.14.6 out-of-scope 1 해소 — legacy_memory strict opt-out 정렬, 2026-07-17): **Task 3 follow-up close-out + v0.15.0+ ⚠️ BREAKING caller 정합.** maturity_matrix v0.14.6 description 의 "Out of scope v0.15.0" 2건 중 1건 해소. (1) **`cmd_refresh_maturity` 에 `--legacy-memory` / `--no-legacy-memory` flag 추가** (`workflow-source/tools/release_pipeline.py` `argparse.BooleanOptionalAction`): `--no-legacy-memory` (strict opt-out) 면 silent fallback 비활성 caller 로 간주, maturity refresh 자체 skip + `legacy_memory_strict_opt_out: True` + `skip_reason` field emit. (2) **`cmd_release` 의 `p_rel` argparse 에 동일 flag 추가** (release level flag): step 6.7 의 `cmd_refresh_maturity(args)` 호출 시 `args.legacy_memory == False` 면 skip message emit (`[maturity] skip (--no-legacy-memory strict opt-out — v0.15.0+ ⚠️ BREAKING caller 정합)`). **v0.15.0 ⚠️ BREAKING 정합** — `cache.py` 의 silent fallback 자체가 disable 된 caller 가 maturity refresh 도 안 하는 정합법 (release 시 caller 의 legacy_memory strict 가 release 의 maturity gate 와 동기화). (3) **신규 smoke `tests/check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2.py` 4/4 PASS**: case_1 `--no-legacy-memory` strict opt-out (refreshed=False + skip_reason + 실제 file 미변경) + case_2 `--legacy-memory=True` (정공법 진행 + 정상 갱신) + case_3 default None (정공법 진행 + mode=apply) + case_4 step 6.7 skip message (`[maturity] skip (--no-legacy-memory strict opt-out ...)`). **Out of scope 2** (release_error 시에만 maturity 호출) 은 v0.15.3 별도 release candidate. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 (신규) + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 (기존 회귀 ❌) + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 = **7 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 3 file (1 release_pipeline parser+gate + 1 smoke + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신).

v0.15.3 (v0.14.6 out-of-scope 2 해소 — release_error 시에만 maturity refresh, 2026-07-17): **Task 3 follow-up complete close-out.** maturity_matrix v0.14.6 description 의 "Out of scope v0.15.0" 2건 중 2건 해소. **step 6.7 default 동작 flip**: release_error (results["error"] 존재) 시에만 `cmd_refresh_maturity(args)` 호출. release 성공 시 skip. rationale: release 성공 후 (operator 가 이미 gh release create 성공 확인) maturity 자체가 today 면 no-op 인 호출이 dashboard freshness 와 무관 — release_error (gh release create fail) 상황 에서만 operator 가 retry 할 수 있도록 panel 1 freshness 보강. release_error fallback 정공법. **(1) `cmd_release` step 6.7 의 `if release_error and ...:` guard 추가** + `elif not release_error:` branch 에 `skipped_due_to_release_success: True` field emit (debugging 용). (2) `--no-legacy-memory` strict opt-out (v0.15.2) 와 호환: release_error 이면서 strict opt-out 면 strict skip 우선 (둘 다 적용). (3) **신규 smoke `tests/check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3.py` 3/3 PASS**: case_1 release 성공 시 skip (skipped_due_to_release_success=True + refreshed field 부재) + case_2 release_error 시 호출 (refreshed: bool + before/after 정합 + 실제 file 미변경) + case_3 release_error + --no-legacy-memory (legacy_memory_strict_opt_out=True + skip_reason + refreshed=False). **v0.14.6 out-of-scope 2/2 close**. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3 3/3 (신규) + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 = **8 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 3 file (1 release_pipeline step 6.7 guard + 1 smoke + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신).

v0.15.4 (ADR-007 close-out — 3rd deprecation cycle accepted no-op, 2026-07-17): **ADR-007 placeholder 종결.** v0.11.24 (placeholder 작성) + v0.15.4 (close-out) 의 *2 차례 codebase re-scan* 결과, 3rd deprecation cycle 영향 symbol *의도적 부재* 확인. **v0.15.4+ re-scan 정공법 (smoke `check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4.py` 3/3 PASS)**: (1) case_1 — `warnings.warn(..., DeprecationWarning)` emit call site 가 `workflow_kit/common/decorators.py:v0_7_4_deprecated` decorator 본체 안에서만 2건 (infrastructure only). 다른 module (workflow_kit 그 외, skills/, mcp_servers/, harness 등) 에서는 *직접* emit 0건. (2) case_2 — `__deprecated__ = True` marker 설정 2건 모두 `workflow_kit/common/decorators.py` 안 (decorator 본체) — 다른 module 0건. (3) case_3 — `@v0_7_4_deprecated` decorator 의 *실제 apply* 0건 (docstring usage example 제외). **infrastructure vs surface 분리**: v0.7.4+ 의 `v0_7_4_deprecated` decorator 는 *infrastructure* 로만 존재 (apply 0건). 즉, deprecation *정책* (decorator 정의) 과 *정책 적용 surface* (mark 된 symbol) 가 분리된 상태. **ADR-007 갱신** (`docs/architecture/ADR-007-deprecation-3rd-cycle-candidates.md`): status `draft (placeholder)` → **`accepted (no-op)`** (v0.15.4 close-out) + Date 2026-07-03 (initial), 2026-07-17 (v0.15.4 close-out) + 본문 §3rd cycle 후보 식별 필요성 v0.15.4 re-scan 결과로 갱신 + §Decision `accepted (no-op)` 종결 + §Consequences 갱신 (positive: close-out 의 verifiable anchor, negative: infrastructure vs surface 분리) + §후속 작업 close-out 상태로 갱신. **v1.0.0 진입 평가 anchor** — v1.0.0 milestone 진입 시 status `accepted (no-op)` → `reopened` 가능성 검토 (legacy symbol audit 결과에 따라). **cyclical discipline** — 매 major release 시 smoke `check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4.py` 회귀 검증 (deprecation policy 의 discipline anchor). **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4 3/3 (신규) + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 + check_audit_mkdocs_links 5/5 = **10 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 3 file (1 ADR-007 갱신 + 1 신규 smoke + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신).

v0.15.5 (Panel 4 cross-validation smoke, 2026-07-17): **v0.15.x follow-up 의 cross-check discipline anchor.** Panel 4 (smoke_trend) 의 두 metric cross-validation. Panel 4 의미: (1) `cumulative_total` / `cumulative_pass` = 가장 최근 release note 의 누적 smoke (v0.15.0 = 260) + (2) `smoke_files_count` = `workflow-source/tests/check_*.py` 의 file 갯수 (실제 data 기반, v0.15.5 시점 183) + (3) `cumulative_pass_rate` = pass / total (현 시점 1.0) + (4) `recent_releases` = [version, pass, total] × 5 (newest first). 두 metric 의 의미가 다름 (case 누적 vs file 갯수) — 한 file 에 여러 case 가능, 1:1 매칭 안 됨. **5 case cross-check (smoke `check_smoke_trend_cross_v0_15_5.py` 5/5 PASS)**: (1) **case_1 sanity** — `cumulative_total > 0` + `smoke_files_count > 0` + `cumulative_pass <= total` + `0.0 <= rate <= 1.0` (4 field 정합). (2) **case_2 ratio sanity** — `cumulative_total >= smoke_files_count` (case >= file 가정 정합; 현 시점 260/183 = 1.42 ratio). (3) **case_3 recent_releases consistency** — `recent[0].pass/total == panel top cumulative` (most recent release note 의 누적 = panel top). (4) **case_4 delta vs v0.15.0 baseline** — `smoke_files_count >= 179 + 신규 smoke count` (v0.15.0 baseline 179 + v0.15.2/3/4 신규 3 = expected_min 182; v0.15.5 시점 183 = 182 + 1). panel `smoke_files_count` == 실제 file count (file-based, real-time). (5) **case_5 pass_rate full** — `cumulative_pass_rate == 1.0` + `cumulative_pass == cumulative_total` (full pass 정합). **ratio 관측**: v0.15.5 시점 1.42 ratio — 한 file 당 평균 1.42 case. **discipline anchor**: 매 release 시 panel 4 의 두 metric sanity + cross-check 자동 검증. **cyclical discipline** — 매 major release 시 smoke `check_smoke_trend_cross_v0_15_5.py` 회귀 검증. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_smoke_trend_cross_v0_15_5 5/5 (신규) + check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 + check_audit_mkdocs_links 5/5 = **11 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 3 file (1 신규 smoke + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신 + 1 dashboard regen).

v0.15.6 (Panel 6/8 telemetry cross-validation smoke, 2026-07-17): **Phase 15 Panel 6 + Panel 8 cross-check discipline anchor.** v0.13.1+ telemetry sidecar 인프라 + Panel 8 (memory_index_utilization_v2) + Panel 6 (multi_agent_concurrent_write_conflict) 의 cross-validation. **현 시점 telemetry data 상태**: events.jsonl 1건 (dispatcher source 1개, 2026-07-09) + Panel 8 telemetry_events_total=1 + telemetry_by_source={dispatcher: 1} + hit_rate=1.0 + Panel 6 conflict_count=0 (multi-agent 환경 비활성). 4 source 가능 (session-start / doc-sync / backlog-update / dispatcher) 중 1 source 만 활성 (실제 retrieval 호출이 dispatcher 경로에서만 발생). **4 case cross-check (smoke `check_telemetry_cross_v0_15_6.py` 4/4 PASS)**: (1) **case_1 events.jsonl parse** — `telemetry/events.jsonl` file 존재 + JSON parse 가능 + `MemoryIndexTelemetryEvent` schema 정합 (timestamp, source, query_tokens_count, selected_count, cue_hits, bm25_hits, expansion_hits, error field type check). malformed line 0개 이상 허용 (warn only), valid event ≥ 1 정합 (north-star '1 release ≥ 1 query + hit'). (2) **case_2 Panel 8 source 다양성** — `telemetry_by_source` (dict[str, int]) ≥ 1 source 정합 + 각 source 의 non-negative int + `by_source sum == events_total` cross-check. (3) **case_3 Panel 8 hit_rate sanity** — `hit_rate` 0.0~1.0 + `hit_count <= total_queries` + `events_total >= 1` (north-star) + `rate == hit_count / total_queries` 일치. (4) **case_4 Panel 6 conflict 정합** — `working_tree_conflict_count + git_log_conflict_count == conflict_count` 정합 + `threshold >= 0` + `status = pass if conflict <= threshold else fail` logic 검증. **telemetry 관측**: v0.15.6 시점 1 source (dispatcher) 만 활성 — 3 skill (session-start, doc-sync, backlog-update) 의 retrieval 호출 시 telemetry emit wiring 은 v0.13.1 에서 정공법 적용됐으나, 현 시점 skill 실행이 활발하지 않아 1 source 만 잡힘. **discipline anchor**: telemetry data 부족 시 north-star '1 release ≥ 1 query + hit' 가 *임계* 정합의 anchor. **cyclical discipline** — 매 major release 시 smoke `check_telemetry_cross_v0_15_6.py` 회귀 검증. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_telemetry_cross_v0_15_6 4/4 (신규) + check_smoke_trend_cross_v0_15_5 5/5 + check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 + check_audit_mkdocs_links 5/5 = **12 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 3 file (1 신규 smoke + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신 + 1 dashboard regen).

(4) state 생성기 / session-start 첫 실험 — ✅ 3 skill opt-in wiring (session-start / doc-sync / backlog-update) + `state.json` `memory_entries[]` (v0.13.1). **A → B 적용 결과**: (A) 설계 전용 후속 문서 — ✅ v0.11.22 ADR-005 작성 + ADR-006 회고 자리 박기. (B) 작은 프로토타입 구현 — ✅ v0.11.22 ~ v0.13.1 `memory_index/entries/MEM-*.json` + `cue_anchors` + `primary_abstraction` + `value_digest` + `owners` + `scope` field + `memory-index-query` dispatcher subcommand + 3 skill + telemetry sidecar. **3 layer 분리 (ADR-001) 유지 + retrieval layer 강화 (Memora-inspired metadata)** — §10 권장 사항 (4) 의 'metadata overlay 방식' 정합. **6 row Mapping table**: memory value ✅ / primary abstraction ✅ / cue anchors ✅ / memory merge/update ✅ / policy retrieval ✅ / shared memory space ✅. **discipline anchor**: Memora 개념 차용 가치는 *높음* + 원본 구현 의존성은 *낮음* (의도적 격리) — metadata overlay 방식의 discipline anchor. **cyclical discipline** — 매 major release 시 MICROSOFT_MEMORA_EVALUATION.md 의 status 확인 (accepted 유지, 변경 시 reopened). **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): 기존 15 smoke 모두 PASS (변경 없음, 본 release 는 문서 갱신 + maturity_matrix 갱신 만, 0 code change). **산출물**: 3 file (1 MICROSOFT_MEMORA_EVALUATION.md 갱신 + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신 + 1 dashboard regen).

v0.15.11 (sample tool_version housekeeping + 3-way cross-check smoke, 2026-07-17): **v0.15.0 release 의 sample housekeeping 잔여 issue close + workflow_kit version SSOT 3-way cross-check discipline anchor.** v0.15.0 release note (Beta-v0.15.0.md) 의 claim 은 "samples 24 file tool_version v0.14.7-beta → v0.15.0-beta 갱신" 이었으나, **실제 sample 24 file 모두 v0.14.0-beta 그대로** 였음 (drift prevention case_1 은 pyproject + __init__.py loud fallback 만 검증, sample file 의 tool_version 정합은 검증 부재). 본 release 에서 v0.15.0 release claim 을 정합하게 만들기 위해 sample 24 file 모두 `v0.14.0-beta` → `v0.15.0-beta` 정정. **(1) sample 24 file 정정**: `workflow-source/examples/output_samples/*.json` 24 file 의 `tool_version` field 일괄 v0.14.0-beta → v0.15.0-beta (sed 일괄). (2) **신규 smoke `tests/check_sample_version_cross_v0_15_11.py` 4/4 PASS** (3-way cross-check + structure): (a) **case_1 sample tool_version 일관성** — 모든 .json sample 의 `tool_version` 동일성 검증 (다양성 0개). (b) **case_2 sample tool_version == pyproject** — sample `tool_version` == `f'v{pyproject_version}-beta'` 정합. (c) **case_3 __init__.py loud fallback == pyproject** — `workflow_kit/__init__.py` loud fallback literal == `f'v{pyproject_version}-beta'` 정합 (drift prevention case_1 의 *재 verify* leg). (d) **case_4 sample file structure** — 24 sample 모두 valid JSON + dict + `tool_version` field 존재. **3-way cross-check** — pyproject.toml ↔ __init__.py loud fallback ↔ sample 24 file tool_version 모두 `v0.15.0-beta` 정합. **관측**: v0.15.0 release push 시 sample file housekeeping 이 stale 상태로 push (drift prevention 의 sample 검증 부재가 원인). 본 release 에서 v0.15.0 release 의 claim 을 정합하게 만듦. **discipline anchor**: workflow_kit version SSOT 의 3-way 정합 (pyproject + loud fallback + sample 24 file). **cyclical discipline** — 매 major release 시 sample housekeeping 정합의 discipline anchor. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_sample_version_cross_v0_15_11 4/4 (신규) + check_harness_v0_15_9 4/4 + check_maturity_distribution_cross_v0_15_8 4/4 + check_memory_index_cross_v0_15_7 4/4 + check_telemetry_cross_v0_15_6 4/4 + check_smoke_trend_cross_v0_15_5 5/5 + check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 + check_audit_mkdocs_links 5/5 = **16 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 27 file (1 신규 smoke + 24 sample 정정 + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신 + 1 dashboard regen).

v0.15.12 (README.md cross-check smoke + stale text 정정, 2026-07-17): **v0.15.0 release 의 README housekeeping 잔여 issue close + v1.0.0 진입 평가의 README 정합 anchor.** README.md (root) 의 4 metric 을 pyproject.toml + maturity_matrix.json 와 cross-check. **발견된 in-scope issue 2건**: (1) **README.md line 8 의 stale text** — "**미푸시 19커밋 보강 후 push 권장**" 은 v0.15.0 release prep 의 draft note 였는데, v0.15.0 push 후에도 stale 상태로 남아있음. 정정: "v0.15.0 release 19커밋 보강 후 push 완료". (2) **drift prevention case_4 의 README regex 가 `**버전: vX.Y.Z-beta**` (bold) 만 검증** — README.md 의 실제 형식은 `- 버전: vX.Y.Z-beta` (no bold, list item). 정공법 자체는 정합하지만 regex 의 bold 가정 발견. 본 smoke 에서는 *no bold* 형식도 매치하도록 regex 정정. **(1) README.md 정정**: line 8 의 "미푸시 19커밋 보강 후 push 권장" → "v0.15.0 release 19커밋 보강 후 push 완료". (2) **신규 smoke `tests/check_readme_cross_v0_15_12.py` 4/4 PASS** (4 metric cross-check): (a) **case_1 README 헤더 버전 정합** — `- 버전: vX.Y.Z-beta` (no bold) == pyproject version (drift prevention case_4 의 *재 verify* leg, 더 flexible 한 regex). (b) **case_2 README harness list 정합** — 10 harness 모두 README 본문 등장 + maturity_matrix `harnesses.supported` (10) 정합. (c) **case_3 README package version 정합** — README 본문 내 `package: standard-ai-workflow X.Y.Z` 가 pyproject version 정합 (현재 1개 등장, 모두 0.15.0). (d) **case_4 README stale text 검사** — '미푸시' / 'push 권장' / 'TBD' 같은 placeholder 부재 검증 (stale text 발견 시 fail ❌). **discipline anchor**: README.md 의 version / harness / package / stale text 4 metric 의 cross-panel 정합. **cyclical discipline** — 매 major release 시 smoke `check_readme_cross_v0_15_12.py` 회귀 검증. **검증** (모두 PASS, 회귀 ❌): check_readme_cross_v0_15_12 4/4 (신규) + check_sample_version_cross_v0_15_11 4/4 + check_harness_v0_15_9 4/4 + check_maturity_distribution_cross_v0_15_8 4/4 + check_memory_index_cross_v0_15_7 4/4 + check_telemetry_cross_v0_15_6 4/4 + check_smoke_trend_cross_v0_15_5 5/5 + check_deprecation_3rd_cycle_v0_15_4 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_3 3/3 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_15_2 4/4 + check_refresh_maturity_v0_14_6 4/4 + check_quality_dashboard_v0_13_0 12/12 + check_drift_prevention 6/6 + check_phase15_dashboard_panels 4/4 + check_appendonly_memory_layout 6/6 + check_memory_lint 4/4 + check_audit_mkdocs_links 5/5 = **17 smoke 모두 PASS**. **산출물**: 5 file (1 신규 smoke + 1 README.md 정정 + 1 maturity_matrix 갱신 + 1 state.json + 1 dashboard regen).
